source.title: eGain REST API | API Reference Guide (Knowledge Authoring & Interaction)

csrfForConsoleEmbedded.note: When calling APIs from eGain application consoles, send session as cookie and CSRF token as header.

commonHeaders.Content-Type: application/json or application/xml; OAuth forms use application/x-www-form-urlencoded
commonHeaders.X-egain-session: required on nearly all APIs after login

spaNotes: CORS must be whitelisted in eGain Administration Console for browser SPA origins.
Standalone SPA should prefer a backend BFF/proxy: keep credentials server-side, forward X-egain-session.
Store X-egain-session from login response header; attach on every subsequent request.
On 401, re-login. Knowledge Authoring error shape often {"message":"...Invalid session ID."}.
Optimistic concurrency: checkin/edit often require versions.version.lastModified matching server.
Typical lifecycle: create -> checkout (if needed) -> edit/checkin -> changestage -> publish.
Shared new articles created checked-out; personal articles created published.
GET supports alternateId; mutating calls with alternateId fail with 400.
Department commonly appears as nested {id,name}; folder listing uses ?department={id}.
Language via body language.id and/or query $lang / Accept-Language.

endpoints.name: Login API
endpoints.description: Authenticates user credentials and creates a session. Returns X-egain-session header; no success body.

queryParameters.name: forceLogin
queryParameters.description: Terminate oldest session if user already has 5 concurrent sessions

notes: Max 5 concurrent user WS sessions
Must be first call before most other APIs

endpoints.name: Logout API
endpoints.description: Terminates the session identified by X-egain-session.

endpoints.name: Single Sign-On using SAML
endpoints.description: eGain user SSO login via SAML2 POST binding.
notes: Requires Agent SSO configuration in Admin Console

endpoints.name: SSO using SAML bearer token
endpoints.description: User SSO login with OAuth2 SAML2 bearer grant. Returns access_token (= session) and X-egain-session.

queryParameters.name: application_type
queryParameters.description: Required via query or SAML attribute

notes: Supports auto-provisioning if Admin setting enabled

endpoints.name: Authenticate client application
endpoints.description: OAuth2 client_credentials grant for client applications. Returns access token with expires_in.

response.body: Oauth Login Response Schema (access_token, token_type, expires_in)

notes: Primarily for client-application APIs (e.g. async messaging), not default authoring user session flow

endpoints.name: Revoke access token of client application
endpoints.description: Revokes an existing client application access token.
notes: Request body must be empty
No query parameters allowed

endpoints.name: Composite Request API
endpoints.description: Executes one or more REST API calls in a single request.
notes: Nested URLs are absolute including host/context
All nested auth uses same X-egain-session

endpoints.name: Article Creation API
endpoints.description: Creates article in personal or shared folder. Shared articles start checked-out; personal start published.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Suggested Article Creation API
endpoints.description: Creates a new article suggestion.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Rollback Article API
endpoints.description: Rollback an article to a prior version.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Article Move API
endpoints.description: Moves one or more articles to destination folder.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Article Edit API
endpoints.description: Edits Personal Article, Article, or Approved Article Suggestion.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Edit Article Version API
endpoints.description: Edits an article version.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Article CheckOut API
endpoints.description: Checks out one or more articles (locks for edit).
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Article CheckIn API
endpoints.description: Checks in article(s); includes optimistic concurrency via lastModified.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Article Publish API
endpoints.description: Publishes article version; user must be allowed on workflow stages through published.

required: article id(s) / version lastModified as documented

notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Accept Article Suggestion API
endpoints.description: Accepts article suggestion.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Reject Article Suggestion API
endpoints.description: Rejects article suggestion.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Feedback for Article Suggestion API
endpoints.description: Provides feedback for article suggestion.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Re-suggest Article API
endpoints.description: Resubmits an article as suggestion.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Articles Reset Lock API
endpoints.description: Resets lock on articles.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Request Lock for Article API
endpoints.description: Requests lock on a checked-out article.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Change Article Type API
endpoints.description: Modifies article type.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Change Article Stage API
endpoints.description: Moves article to another review stage.
notes: GET supports alternateId; POST/PUT/DELETE with alternateId -> 400

endpoints.name: Get Article API
endpoints.description: Read articles by id/alternateId or filter by folder/topic/classification/case/relatedArticle.
notes: Comma-separate multiple IDs
alternateId usable on GET

endpoints.name: Get Version API
endpoints.description: Get specific version or list versions for an article.

endpoints.name: Get Latest Version API
endpoints.description: Get latest version for article(s) or by folder.

endpoints.name: Get Review Stages API
endpoints.description: Get review stages available to the requesting user for an article.

endpoints.name: Get Suggestions API
endpoints.description: Get all article suggestions.

endpoints.name: Get My Suggestions API
endpoints.description: Get suggestions for the logged-in user.

endpoints.name: Get Articles For Review
endpoints.description: Get articles awaiting review; filter by reviewStage and knowledgeWorkflow.

endpoints.name: Article Delete API
endpoints.description: Delete one or more articles (comma-separated ids).

endpoints.name: Article Version Delete API
endpoints.description: Delete one or more versions for an article.

endpoints.name: Delete Article-Attachments Link API
endpoints.description: Delink attachments from an article.

endpoints.name: Folder Creation API
endpoints.description: Creates a folder under parent folder or department Shared folder.

endpoints.name: Folder Edit API
endpoints.description: Edits a folder.

endpoints.name: Folder Copy API
endpoints.description: Copies folder to another parent. Body supplies destination parent.

endpoints.name: Folder Move API
endpoints.description: Moves folder to another parent. Body supplies destination parent.

endpoints.name: Get Folder API
endpoints.description: Read folders by IDs, children of parent, or department.

endpoints.name: Get Folder Permissions (ACL) API
endpoints.description: Read ACL permissions for a folder.

endpoints.name: Folder Delete API
endpoints.description: Delete one or more folders.

endpoints.name: Notes Creation API
endpoints.description: Creates a note on an article.

note.content: New Note added to the personal article

endpoints.name: Get Notes API
endpoints.description: Read notes for an article.

endpoints.name: Notes Delete API
endpoints.description: Delete one or more notes (comma-separated note IDs).

endpoints.name: Create External Attachment API
endpoints.description: Create an external attachment, optionally linked to an article.

endpoints.name: Create Internal Attachment API
endpoints.description: Create an internal (uploaded file) attachment linked to an article.

endpoints.name: Edit External Attachment API
endpoints.description: Edit an external attachment.

endpoints.name: Get Attachment API
endpoints.description: Read attachments for an article/version. article (+ version or $lang) required.

endpoints.name: Get Topics API
endpoints.description: Read topics by IDs or filter by portal/department/parent/article.

endpoints.name: Get Article-Order API
endpoints.description: Retrieve top/bottom article order within a topic.

endpoints.name: Create Topic API
endpoints.description: Create topic under parent topic or department (root).

endpoints.name: Add Articles To Topic API
endpoints.description: Link one or more articles to a topic.

endpoints.name: Topic Move API
endpoints.description: Move source topic under destination (body).

endpoints.name: Topic Copy API
endpoints.description: Copy source topic under destination.

endpoints.name: Edit Topic API
endpoints.description: Edit one or more topics.

endpoints.name: Edit Article-Order API
endpoints.description: Edit order of articles in a topic.

endpoints.name: Topic Delete API
endpoints.description: Delete one or more topics.

endpoints.name: Remove Articles From Topic API
endpoints.description: Unlink articles from a topic.

endpoints.name: Get All Article Types and Templates
endpoints.description: Retrieves article types and templates for a department.
notes: Docs also show lowercase articletype in examples

endpoints.name: Get Article Template
endpoints.description: Get a specific article template by ID.
